calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Jan-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Petition To Compel Mediation And Arbitration And For An Order Dismissing The Krueger Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS ESPERANZA NEVAREZ AND JOSE NEVAREZ'S Petition To Compel Mediation And Arbitration And For An Order Dismissing The Krueger Complaint is taken Off calendar. The court signed the parties' stipulation and proposed order, which resolves this motion. No appearances are necessary. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
